headline: The guide to great packing, by HTSI
summary: Yesterday’s FT – and other top travel essentials from the air-mile experts
body_text:
For me, it’s all about staying healthy. I always fly economy so, before the flight, I download a few meditations from the app Waking Up. I bring sachets of Manuka honey from Mahoni: take one before you take off and one when you land, a third before you go to bed, and then again the following morning. A Theragun Mini massage gun is a must. I also use a TriggerPoint Massage Ball ($27.99).

I always travel with resistance bands because they fold flat and you can do a great hotel-room workout with them. I recommend a Patagonia down hoodie (£260) – great for napping – and I wear a lot of Alo: the T-shirts are so soft. You need zips on all your bottom pockets so things don’t fall out. And finally, put Apple AirTags (from £35) on everything.

I once got a great piece of advice: “Don’t pack anything you haven’t worn before.” Every time I convince myself to bring that dress I haven’t touched in years, I end up hauling it there and back without ever putting it on. And my favourite: Eucerin’s Aqu
